trending_themes.theme: Global Asia tour + Begin Again / Should've Known Better singles
trending_themes.evidence: Begin Again with Mokita (Feb 2026); Should've Known Better feat. KENNEDY (April 2026). Global Asia tour underway.
2025 Chrysalis album (with sapientdream) placed on Grammy ballot for Best Dance/Electronic Album.
Early 2025 'Money' collab with Girls' Generation's HYO demonstrated K-pop crossover potential.

annotation_hooks: Slushii's K-pop adjacency (HYO collab) reflects broader EDM-K-pop convergence narrative; his melodic emotional storytelling shares DNA with K-pop's cathartic listening culture
Dual identity (commercial EDM / ambient sapientdream) mirrors K-pop's idol/human split — producer version of the persona vs. shadow dichotomy
raw_headlines: Slushii Drops Begin Again with Mokita
Should've Known Better Feat. KENNEDY Arrives April 2026
